behavior_in_task_description.reason: All tested items (file paths, defaultLayer exports, Effect.fn/fnUntraced counts, Promise.all removal, yield* Config.Service/Plugin.Service, InstanceState.make, typecheck, test path) are named explicitly in instruction.md requirements 1-11.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and requirements, but doesn't show the exact code changes; agent must still figure out how to yield services and restructure generators.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for structural patterns (Effect.fn/gen, yield* Service, defaultLayer export, no Promise.all) that any correct refactor would have; don't assert specific variable names or line positions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include repo typecheck and registry test suite execution, plus structural regex checks; behavior is verified via bun test and tsc.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual Effect refactoring (yield* Config.Service, Effect.forEach, defaultLayer exports) and running tests/typecheck — stubs cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the 11 numbered requirements in instruction.md has corresponding test(s) covering it.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass, config-derived, anti-stub, repo CI/CD) and tagged with [pr_diff]/[agent_config]/[static]/[repo_tests].

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code refactoring, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and commands (registry.ts, plugin/index.ts, bunx turbo typecheck, bun test test/tool/registry.test.ts) match actual paths.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the modules (registry.ts, plugin/index.ts) which is appropriate since localization is not the task; does not cite exact lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only refactoring task, not an AGENTS.md config edit task.
